text: C11 was promoted as the sweep winner across 20 variants.

locator.quote: headline number is the Brier improvement — 37 % reduction with

text: The headline result is the Brier improvement: 37% reduction with no Pearson cost, indicating a calibration win.
Round-4 ablations on C11 showed every standard recipe change (AdamW, GELU, label smoothing, longer training, focal loss) hurt held-out Pearson.
